nasb.text: Are you better than No-amon, Which was situated by the waters of the Nile, With water surrounding her, Whose rampart was the sea, Whose wall consisted of the sea?

esv.text: Are you better than Thebes that sat by the Nile, with water around her, her rampart a sea, and water her wall?

cnv.text: 你比挪亞們還強嗎？ 挪亞們位於尼羅河流域， 周圍有水環繞； 海是她的屏障， 水作她的牆垣。

ccb.text: 你能强过底比斯吗？ 底比斯位于尼罗河上， 四面环水， 水是她的屏障， 又是她的城墙。
